case_title: TEYUN TSAO VS. CARLOS ANTONIO MEJIA MONTOYA ET AL

docket_entries.description: REMARK:RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE AUG-26-2024 SC-100 MAIL TO DEFENDANT(KARLA MELARA)(ENVOLOPE MARKED:RETURN TO SENDER UNCLAIMED UNABLE TO FORWARD)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$75.00); DOCUMENT STAMPED "BY FAX". SERVED SEP-11-2024, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MELARA, KARLA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-01-2024 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TSAO, TEYUN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MEJIA MONTOYA, CARLOS ANTONIO $8,412.31 PRINCIPAL, $255.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,667.31 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY TSAO, TEYUN AS TO DEFENDANT MEJIA MONTOYA, CARLOS ANTONIO MELARA, KARLA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-01-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REMARK:RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE AUG-30-2024 SC-100 MAIL TO DEFENDANT(CARLOS MONTOYA) (ENVOLOPE MARKED:RETURN TO SENDER UNCLAIMED UNABLE TO FORWARD)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-01-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-01-2024 BY DAVID FLEISIG. PLAINTIFF TEYUN TSAO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS CARLOS ANTONIO MEJIA MONTOYA & KARLA MELARA IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER MONICA HERNANDEZ. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: L. YOUNG. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
